templatesandbox-desc: [[Special:TemplateSandbox|Waxay soo bandhigtaa bog]] iyadoo laga soo xiganayo tusmada ka yimaadda bacaadka
templatesandbox-text:
Waxaad dooran kartaa koox tusmada ah oo lagu kaydiyay booska bacaadka adigoo isticmaalaya horgale bacaad ku habboon.
Tusaale ahaan, haddii aad rabto inaad hor u eegto nooc ka mid ah {{ns:Template}}:Test oo aad u kaydisay sida "{{ns:User}}:Foo/{{int:templatesandbox-suffix}}/{{ns:Template}}:Test", isticmaal "{{ns:User}}:Foo/{{int:templatesandbox-suffix}}" sida horgalaha.
templatesandbox-revid-label: Nooca wax ka beddelka soo bandhig:
templatesandbox-editform-legend: Hor u eeg bogga oo leh tusmadaan
templatesandbox-invalid-title: Cinwaanka aad sheegtay waa mid aan sax ahayn.
templatesandbox-revision-not-exists: Nooca wax ka beddelka aad sheegtay ma jiro.
templatesandbox-revision-no-content: Nooca wax ka beddelka aad sheegtay ma laha wax ku jira, ama ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku arki karto.
templatesandbox-invalid-prefix: Horgalaha bacaadka aad sheegtay waa mid aan sax ahayn.
templatesandbox-prefix-not-local: Horgalaha bacaadka aad sheegtay ma aha mid maxalli ah.
templatesandbox-page-or-revid: Waa inaad gelisaa cinwaan bog ama lambarka aqoonsiga wax ka beddelka.
templatesandbox-fail-post: Sababo la xiriira lumis xogta fadhiga, hor-u-eegista waa la qariyey si looga taxaddaro weerarro JavaScript ah. Haddii tani ay tahay isku day hor-u-eegis oo sax ah, fadlan mar kale isku day. Haddii weli aysan shaqayn, isku day inaad [[Special:UserLogout|ka baxdo]] ka dibna mar kale soo gasho.
templatesandbox-fail-post-anon: Maadaama aadan soo galin, hor u eegista waa la qariyey si looga taxaddaro weerarro JavaScript ah. Haddii tani ay tahay isku day hor u eegis oo sax ah, fadlan [[Special:UserLogin|soo gal]] oo mar kale isku day.
templatesandbox-anon-limited-preview: Hor u eegista isbeddellada JavaScript iyo CSS waa la damiyay marka aan la soo galin. Haddii aad u baahan tahay inaad hor u eegto isbeddelladaas, fadlan [[Special:UserLogin|soo gal]] oo mar kale isku day.
templatesandbox-editform-need-template: Si aad u hor u eegto bog kale oo leh tusmadaan, waa in la sheegaa magaca tusmada.
templatesandbox-editform-need-title: Si aad u hor u eegto bog kale oo leh tusmadaan, waa in la sheegaa cinwaanka bogga.
templatesandbox-editform-invalid-templat: Magaca tusmada aad sheegtay waa mid aan sax ahayn.
templatesandbox-editform-invalid-title: Cinwaanka aad u sheegtay hor u eegista waa mid aan sax ahayn.
templatesandbox-editform-title-not-exist: Cinwaanka aad u sheegtay hor u eegista ma jiro.
templatesandbox-failed-replace-section: Waa lagu guul darraystay in la beddelo qayb ka mid ah bogga jira.
